title: Management of Vertisols for improved agricultural production: proceedings of an IBSRAM Inaugural Workshop, 18-22 Feb 1985, ICRISAT Center, India
abstract:
This volume includes 23 papers presented at the workshop, the welcome address, summaries of discussions,
and the recommendations. Covered are such themes as approaches to management of Vertisols in different
agroclimatic zones, research needs and constraints, technologies available and their components, methods of
technology transfer, and the concept of a Vertisols network.
